landing.heroEyebrow: Le Parcours — Your journey to studying and settling in France
landing.heroTitle: Your journey to France starts here.
landing.heroSubtitle: Expert, bilingual guidance for international students — from university application and visa support to airport pickup and settling into life in Paris.
landing.stagesTitle: We support you at every stage
landing.stagesSubtitle: From your home country to being fully settled in Paris — we are with you the whole way.
landing.servicesTitle: Everything you need, in one place
landing.servicesSubtitle: Browse our full service catalog or create an account to book directly.
landing.whyTitle: Not an agency. A personal guide.
landing.whyBody: Le Parcours is run by an independent Paris-based consultant who has helped hundreds of international students navigate the French system. You get a real person, not a chatbot or a ticket queue.
landing.accomSubtitle: Browse curated, student-friendly accommodation across Paris neighbourhoods.
landing.ctaBody: Create your free account today. Track your progress, access our guides, and book services — all in one place.
landing.footerTagline: Your journey to studying and settling in France.
landing.servicePreview1Desc: Institution selection, document prep, and submission guidance.
landing.servicePreview2Desc: Account setup, application form, and interview preparation.
landing.servicePreview3Desc: Complete document checklist and VFS appointment guidance.
landing.servicePreview4Desc: Private pickup on arrival day, straight to your accommodation.
landing.servicePreview5Desc: Guidance and in-person accompaniment to open a French bank account.
landing.servicePreview6Desc: Register with Ameli and obtain your French health card.
landing.why1Desc: Your consultant lives and works in Paris — real local knowledge, not generic advice.
landing.why2Desc: You are never handed a PDF. Every student gets personal, tailored support.
landing.why3Desc: All services available in English and French. No language barrier at any stage.
landing.why4Desc: From university application to getting your metro card — we handle every step.
landing.testimonial1Quote: Without this service I would have been completely lost. My Campus France procedure went smoothly and I had someone at the airport waiting for me on day one.
landing.testimonial2Quote: Getting my Carte Vitale and opening a bank account on my own would have taken months. With the consultant's help it took two weeks. Genuinely invaluable.
landing.testimonial3Quote: The document checklist saved me so much stress. I always knew exactly what I needed next. Highly recommend to any student coming to France.
landing.faq1Q: What is Campus France and do I need it?
landing.faq1A: Campus France is the French government agency that manages international student applications to French institutions. Most non-EU students who want a long-stay visa must go through the Campus France procedure, which includes creating an account, completing an application, and attending an interview at the French embassy or consulate in their home country.
landing.faq2Q: Do I need to speak French to study in France?
landing.faq2A: Not necessarily. Many French universities offer programs taught entirely in English, especially at the Master's level. However, knowing some French will significantly improve your daily life in France. We can guide you on language requirements for your chosen institution.
landing.faq3Q: How long does the visa process take?
landing.faq3A: The French long-stay student visa (VLS-TS) typically takes 3–8 weeks to process after your VFS appointment. We recommend starting the process at least 3 months before your intended departure date to allow time for document gathering, Campus France procedures, and VFS appointments.
landing.faq4Q: What is the OFII validation and when must I do it?
landing.faq4A: OFII (Office Français de l'Immigration et de l'Intégration) validation is a mandatory step within 3 months of arriving in France. You validate your long-stay visa online at ofii.fr. Failing to do this can invalidate your visa status. We help you complete this step promptly after arrival.
landing.faq5Q: Can I find accommodation through this platform?
landing.faq5A: Yes. Our accommodation section lists available options by Paris neighbourhood, with photos and pricing. We also provide personalised accommodation search assistance as a paid service — helping you with applications, communication with landlords, and understanding tenant rights in France.
landing.faq6Q: How much does it cost to use Le Parcours?
landing.faq6A: Creating an account, browsing services, using the journey tracker, and accessing the knowledge base are completely free. Individual services (visa support, airport pickup, etc.) are priced per service. View all service prices in our services catalog.
